issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete and incorrect. Card text requires: (1) look at top 5 cards, (2) reveal up to 1 Supernovas card (excluding 'More Pizza!!'), (3) add to hand, (4) place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL does not implement the 5-card peek, exclusion filter, or bottom-deck placement logic.
Second effect with DrawCard and Trigger trigger is not supported by card text. No conditional draw exists in the official text.
Filter uses ByName which searches entire deck. Should use type-based filtering for {Supernovas} and exclude 'More Pizza!!' specifically.

suggestedDsl.effectText: Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Supernovas} type card other than [More Pizza!!] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
